message:
fix(fj-conformance): bound detached fixture timeout workers

- Add validation for external transform fixture bundles:
  - Reject bundles with more than 4096 cases
  - Reject cases with non-zero simulated_delay_ms (test-only field)
- Skip cases where simulated_delay_ms exceeds case_timeout
- Extract timeout_case_report helper to reduce duplication

Fixes frankenjax-f3r2

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
